title: Middle Eastern Fish Cakes
description: A flavorful and crispy Middle Eastern-inspired fish cake dish. Serve with your favorite side or in a pita with your favorite toppings.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the fish, bread crumbs, spice blend, egg, garlic, and salt. Mix well.
Divide the mixture into 6-8 portions, depending on the desired size. Shape each portion into a patty.
Heat about 1/2 inch (1 cm) of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Fry the patties for about 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and cooked through.
Transfer the patties to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake in the preheated oven for about 10-12 minutes, until crispy on the outside and cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
